content.en:
"Lord Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon, I will enter the battlefield of the main headquarters of the Arrow Mother!"

Ye Tian assured.

Although it is very dangerous there, there are also many opportunities, such as the benefits of entering the Emperor List, and there are also records there, which can be exchanged for resources.

The main department of the Luo mother let the emperor-level and ancient demon level of other tribes work hard, so they naturally want to give benefits.

Of course, in this era, the slaughter on that battlefield is not so tragic, after all, it will be a long time before the catastrophe of time and space.

Therefore, it is not very dangerous to enter this era.

But even so, if the strength is too weak, the danger will be great.

Therefore, the Dragon Shadow Tribe also hoped that Ye Tian could shelter some other emperors, so they took out a lot of resources to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was not polite, and accepted these resources.

After the Dragon Shadow Ancient Demon left, Ye Tian continued to cultivate.

Since the 90,000 Ancient Demon Era, his cultivation has improved a lot, and now his cultivation realm is equivalent to a high-level emperor, but his physical body is already extremely powerful, and the life pattern has been perfected by him again, which is very close to the life pattern of the ancient demon level.

In addition, he has perfected the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, and in his time, he is already the top self-created ultimate way 120, but in this era, it is far from the top, but it is enough to be comparable to the self-created way of ordinary top ancient demons.

And the first form of the True Lin form, he also cultivated to the Dacheng realm of the first form, which is because he constantly uses the Demon Ancient Mirror to deduce and cultivate, plus he uses it again and again, and uses the copy body to study, so that there is such progress.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength is much stronger than when he killed Kwai Di at the beginning.

If he fights Aoi again now, he may still not be able to keep Aoi, but he can inflict heavy damage on Aoi in a few moves.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed, and it is almost time for the Dragon Disciple Tribe to agree.

However, he still hadn't raised his cultivation to the pinnacle of the emperor level, after all, it was not so easy to improve the cultivation of the emperor level.

But in terms of strength, he still improved a little.

this day.

Ye Tian left the Eagle Department and headed for the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

Soon, he arrived at the Dragon Disciple Tribe and met dozens of emperors, all of whom were top-level emperors, all of whom were preparing to go to the battlefield of the main headquarters of the Arrow.

Some of them are emperor-level of the Dragon Disciple Department (AEAH), and some are emperor-level of other tribes, and they are willing to go to the battlefield for different reasons, some are orders, some are for chance, in order to break through the slightest possibility of the existence of the ancient demon level.

After all, if you stay here, it will be too difficult to break through to an ancient demon-level existence, and if you survive on that battlefield, you can exchange it for enough opportunities to break through.

That's why they're willing to take risks.

Of course, some are also afraid of the dragon disciple tribe, and if they are not worried, they will be troubled by the dragon disciple tribe.

Soon.

The three ancient demon-level beings of the Dragon Disciple Tribe also came, and they will also enter that battlefield, namely Long Chen, Long Shu, and Long Xiong, among which Long Xiong is the last clansman of the Dragon Disciple Tribe to break through to the ancient demon level.

The reason why Long Xiong wanted to go to that battlefield was because his strength was okay and he had the means to save his life, so he would enter that battlefield not long after breaking through the ancient demon level.

And the dragon shadow is the ancestor of the dragon disciple tribe, so he naturally won't go.

"Come with us!"

Long Shu said.

"Yes!"

Many emperors responded one after another.

Rumble!!!!

An ancient giant ship emerged, and many emperor-level people entered the giant ship, and then the giant ship began to shuttle through the ultimate void, heading towards the depths of the Abyss of Aromu.

The speed of the giant boat was no less than that of an ancient demon-level existence, but when the giant boat entered an area, the speed suddenly decreased by more than a hundred times.

"What's going on?"

Many emperors are not clear, and they are very confused.

Long Shu explained: "This is the territory that has entered the main department of the Aluo Mother, and the ultimate rules here have been reset by the ultimate ancient demon existence, any ancient demon level existence or even the emperor level, in this area, it will not be able to have a very fast speed, and the combat destructive power will be reduced by more than a hundred times." "

"I see!"

Many emperors understood, so they didn't ask.

Soon, the giant ship came to a huge space-time portal in the main headquarters of the mother of Aro.

And after the giant boat was checked, it directly escaped into this gate of time and space, and entered the space-time battlefield of the thirty-six main departments such as the main department of Aluomu - the space-time battlefield of Huoxi!

After entering this battlefield, the ship came to an unimaginably large fortress, which was like a drop of water mixed into the sea.

Soon.

The giant ship docked at a space-time port in the fortress, and many emperors descended from the giant ship and entered a passage in this fortress.

Long Shu introduced: "I haven't been here either, but Lord Plotz has mentioned to me that this is the Arrow Mother Fortress, which was built by the Arrow Mother Headquarters, and is also the base of the Arrow Mother Fortress on the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield. The ancient demon-level existence of the main department of the Luo Mu and the emperors under his command are all staying here, this is the place that will not be breached, and it is also the safest place on the battlefield, only by leaving this Luo Mu Fortress can you really enter the cruel battlefield. "

Many emperors didn't speak, and followed the three ancient demon-level existences to a rest area in the Arrowmu Fortress.

Soon, an emperor came here, settled them here, and introduced: "From today on, your rest area will be arranged here, you are from the dragon disciple tribe, and the team here is mainly tribeal, so you will be the dragon disciple battle group of the Aromu Fortress in the future." I will inform you of any tasks in the future. Keep in mind that for every 1,000 Elder Demon Eras, the Dragons' Warband must complete a mission, and if they can't complete a mission, they must accept a mandatory mission from the Arrowmu Fortress. "

"Yes!"

Long Shu replied, he didn't dare to be disrespectful to this emperor, after all, this was the emperor-level of the main department of the Luo mother, and the existence of the ancient demon level outside the country did not dare to be arrogant to him.

Subsequently, Long Shu and other ancient demon level and emperor level rested here, and each emperor level found a building as their own cave mansion, and opened up a new world inside, so as to use it as their own retreat place.

Ye Tian quickly opened up a world suitable for himself in a building, and thus began to cultivate here.

"The ultimate particle is very rich, but if you don't come here for the record, then it's in vain, let's go see what the mission is!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Others are eager for 1,000 ancient demon eras to complete a task, and will not take the initiative to take the task, but he is different, he thinks about the battle record, and thinks about improving his strength.

So, he came to the mission hall of the Aromu Fortress.
